message:
fix: add exponential backoff and max retries to WebSocket reconnection (#3870) (#3880)

The onclose handler previously scheduled reconnection after a fixed 3s
delay with no backoff and no retry limit, causing an infinite loop and
memory leak when the agent server was down.

Changes:
- Replace fixed 3s delay with exponential backoff: 1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, 16s, capped at 30s
- Stop reconnecting after 10 consecutive failures
- Reset retry counter on successful connection
- Log reconnection attempts and failures instead of silently swallowing errors

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
